user_prompt: Sanctify the storm bolter during cycling
prayer:
Approach the storm bolter with reverence, mechadendrites poised to invoke the Omnissiah upon its sacred form.

Verify the storm bolter's harmonious fury with diagnostic auspex scans and litanies of purity.
Seal the rite with electro-consecration, glorifying the storm bolter's eternal vigilance.
